---
name: governedReview
description: Review a change with governance, validation, security, and workshop clarity in mind.
agent: reviewer
---
Review the requested change with a governed-delivery mindset.

Focus on:

- correctness
- missing validation
- security and policy concerns
- unclear instructions for a live presenter
- whether the story cleanly continues into code review, security scan, workflow agents, and SRE

Prefer concise, high-signal findings.
